hooks.prompt:
You are a pre-save validator for a Singapore education web project. Examine the file being written or edited and check for these three violations:
1. CASING: Does the content contain any Tailwind 'uppercase' class on headings, labels, or UI text elements? If yes, block with decision=deny and explain which line.
2. SCHOOL DATA: If the file path contains 'OpenHouseGuidePageBody', verify both 'NUS High School' and 'St. Andrew' appear in the FEATURED_SCHOOLS array with thisWeekend: true. If either is missing or lacks thisWeekend: true, block.
3. CALENDAR: If any open house date strings are added or modified, verify they fall on weekends or valid 2026 Singapore public holidays.
If no violations found, allow. Input: $ARGUMENTS

hooks.command: CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'git (commit|push)' || exit 0; VIOLATIONS=$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -E '\.(tsx|ts|jsx|js)$' | xargs grep -l '\buppercase\b' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$VIOLATIONS" ]; then echo "{\"continue\": false, \"stopReason\": \"Pre-commit blocked: 'uppercase' Tailwind class found in staged files — replace with normal-case.\"}"; exit 0; fi; BODY="components/OpenHouseGuidePageBody.tsx"; if [ -f "$BODY" ]; then if ! grep -q 'NUS High' "$BODY" || ! grep -q 'St\. Andrew' "$BODY"; then echo "{\"continue\": false, \"stopReason\": \"Pre-commit blocked: NUS High School or St. Andrews missing from OpenHouseGuidePageBody.tsx.\"}"; exit 0; fi; fi; exit 0
